title: stelis ellipsophylla
intro: Stelis ellipsophylla, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis ellipsophylla include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Stelis ellipsophylla may include infusions, decoctions, or poultices, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
